mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `shop_audit` (user_id, cover_image_url, gallery_images, name, location, address, user_name, phone, start_time, end_time, customer_phone, customer_code_img, description, submit_time, audit_status,qualification_cert, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{data.userId}, #{data.coverImageUrl}, #{data.galleryImages}, #{data.name}, #{data.location}, #{data.address}, #{data.userName}, #{data.phone}, #{data.startTime}, #{data.endTime}, #{data.customerPhone}, #{data.customerCodeImg}, #{data.description}, #{data.submitTime}, #{data.auditStatus},#{data.qualificationCert}, #{data.createTime}, #{data.updateTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE `shop_audit`
audit_status = #{data.auditStatus},
audit_user = #{data.auditUser},
audit_time = #{data.auditTime},
audit_phone = #{data.auditPhone},
reject_reason = #{data.rejectReason},
shop_id = #{data.shopId},
qualification_cert = #{data.qualificationCert},
update_time = #{data.updateTime},
WHERE id = #{data.id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM `shop_audit` WHERE name = #{name} AND audit_status IN (0, 1)
